name: Trend Micro Vision One
description: Integrates with Trend Vision One XDR platform API v3.0 for workbench alerts, endpoint activity data, detection and response actions, and threat hunting

actions.name: List Workbench Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve workbench alerts from the Trend Vision One platform with filtering options

parameters.name: startDateTime
parameters.description: Start date-time for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDateTime
parameters.description: End date-time for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: Sort order (e.g., createdDateTime desc)

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific workbench alert

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the workbench alert

actions.name: Update Alert Status
actions.description: Update the status of a workbench alert (new, in progress, resolved, etc.)

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert to update

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status for the alert (new, inProgress, truePositive, falsePositive)

actions.name: List Observed Attack Techniques
actions.description: Retrieve observed attack techniques events matching specified criteria

parameters.name: detectedStartDateTime
parameters.description: Start of the detection time range (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: detectedEndDateTime
parameters.description: End of the detection time range (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of results

actions.name: Search Endpoint Activity Data
actions.description: Search endpoint activity data for threat hunting using query expressions

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query expression for endpoint activity data

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start of the search time range (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End of the search time range (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: top
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Isolate Endpoint
actions.description: Isolate an endpoint from the network for containment during incident response

parameters.name: endpointName
parameters.description: Hostname of the endpoint to isolate

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of why the endpoint is being isolated

actions.name: Restore Endpoint Connection
actions.description: Restore network connectivity to a previously isolated endpoint

parameters.name: endpointName
parameters.description: Hostname of the endpoint to restore

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of why the endpoint is being restored

actions.name: Terminate Process
actions.description: Terminate a running process on a managed endpoint

parameters.name: endpointName
parameters.description: Hostname of the endpoint

parameters.name: fileSha1
parameters.description: SHA1 hash of the process file to terminate

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of why the process is being terminated

actions.name: Add to Block List
actions.description: Add file hashes to the suspicious object block list across all endpoints

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Object type: fileSha1, fileSha256, ip, domain, url, senderMailAddress

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The indicator value to block

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of why the object is being blocked

parameters.name: riskLevel
parameters.description: Risk level: high, medium, low

actions.name: Collect File
actions.description: Collect a file from an endpoint for forensic analysis

parameters.name: endpointName
parameters.description: Hostname of the endpoint

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: Full path of the file to collect

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of why the file is being collected
